title: Lucas' Flight Hud
description: A simple hud for the elytra
body:
The elytra hud gives you information and stats while you are flying.

## Stats Shown

* Speed in blocks per second (left bar)
* The direction you are facing
* How high or low you are looking (right bar)
* Your height off the closest block below you in blocks

![overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iLHBCUin/images/ea575dd7153b57336abbd2aec0ee70a7cdaea567.png)
![caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iLHBCUin/images/0e3ab3348c6ad36aebd3241b94ac4491b58df750.png)

## Future features

* Early warning system for when you are about to crash into a block
* Configuration menu to enable and disable features
